# --- deepinfra API backend (Cogent) — static; covers rotating api.deepinfra.com IPs ---
# Observed pool 38.101.151.13-30; /24 closes the short-TTL rotation gap (cf. Anthropic 160.79.104.0/24).

# --- kino.pub video CDN — foreign hosting (OVH FR / intergenia DE / G-Core DE) ---
# Stream served from bare dedicated-server IPs (not kino.pub subdomains), so the kino.pub
# DNS-FWD misses them -> they fell to antifilter default -> local RU WAN -> TSPU throttle/drop
# -> video metadata/stream failed while the catalog (kino.pub API, personal-foreign) worked.
# Captured 2026-06-27 from AppleTV 10.20.0.76. See dobor list kino-cdn-suspects for more.
